name: quantize
description: Quantize — Node toolchain for TypeScript type generation (used from M1.3).
comment: Node 24 LTS is the project baseline. devDependencies (e.g. json-schema-to-typescript) and package-lock.json are added in M1.3, under Node 24 — NOT under an EOL Node line (see docs/plans/M1_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §6, HIGH-6).
